texto: Why do people always expect you to trust them? With all the shit that goes on in this world, I don't know why anyone expects my trust just because they are unverifiably, according to themselves, a nice guy. Who the hell defaults to trust?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Malka Older que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Why do people always expect you to trust them? With all the shit that goes on in this world, I do…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, trust, people, com foco em reflexao.
